case_title: BAY APARTMENT COMMUNITIES vs. PAGE, JOSEPH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY APARTMENT COMMUNITIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGE, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 965 SUTTER ST #721, LEASE FORFEITED
